tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 旄丘之葛兮，何誕之節兮，叔兮伯兮，何多日也。 何其處也，必有與也，何其久也，必有以也。 狐裘蒙戎，匪車不東，叔兮伯兮，靡所與同。 瑣兮尾兮，流離之子，叔兮伯兮，褎如充耳。

1 The dolichos on that high and sloping mound ; — How wide apart are [now] its joints !
0 ye uncles, Why have ye delayed these many da)7s ? Why do they rest without stirring? It must be they expect allies. Why do they prolong the time? There must be a reason for their conduct. Our fox-furs are frayed and worn. Came our carriages not eastwards ?
0 ye m>cles, You do not sympathize with us. Fragments, and a remnant, Children ol dispersion [are we] !
0 ye uncles, Notwithstanding your full robes, your ears are stopped.
